questions.question: What is the shorthand syntax for targeting a named slot called 'header' in Vue?
What problem do scoped slots solve?
options: They allow CSS styles from the parent to reach the child's elements
They let the child pass data back to the parent through slot props
They prevent slot content from being rendered more than once
They make slot content lazy-loaded for performance

questions.question: When should you use a slot instead of a prop?
options: When passing a simple string value to display
When passing a boolean flag to toggle behavior
When the parent decides what to display and the child decides where to place it
When the data needs to be validated before rendering
